name: GolfCube Social
about: GolfCube Social is an indoor golf venue that combines world-class golf simulators with social entertainment. The facility features state-of-the-art Golfzon sim equipped with moving swing mats, auto-tee systems, and high-speed camera sensors for realistic gameplay. It offers a casual environment where golfers can play, practice, improve their game, and enjoy arcade-style golf, all under one roof. The venue is designed for both serious golf practice and social events, with amenities including a fully stocked pro shop and the flexibility to bring your own food and beverages.
why_golfers_like_it: Tour-level Golfzon simulators with moving swing mats and auto-tee systems
High-speed camera sensors provide precise swing feedback for real-time improvement
Family-friendly environment with kids' arcade golf options
Flexible BYO food and beverage policy for a relaxed social experience
Pro shop with premium equipment and accessories available for purchase

simulator_hardware.notes: Moving swing mats, auto-tee system, high-speed camera sensors

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GolfCube Social provides all necessary equipment, but you are welcome to bring your own clubs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverages) policy, allowing you to bring your own food and drinks.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: 18 holes typically take 1.5 to 2 hours to play, depending on group size and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GolfCube Social offers kid-friendly golf arcade games and is suitable for family events and birthday parties.
